title: Protocol for STO Cell Transfection by FuGENE HD
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6ii4u","text":"Protocol for Transfection Mouse Embryonic Stem Cells. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: STO cells were seeded the day before transfection with the density 15,000 cells per well in 100 μl complete growth medium DMEM+10% Fetal Bovine Serum.
Prepare 0.02μg/μl pCMVβ plasmid DNA solution in OptiMEM®. Tissue culture 96-round bottom well plates were used for complex preparation.
Add 6μl of reagent to 100 μl of OptiMEM® /DNA solution.
Add 5μl complex per well to the cells, and mix thoroughly. Optimal ratio reagent/DNA may vary in range 0.2μl/0.1μg to 0.35μl/0.1μg.
Place the cells into CO2 incubator for 26-28 hours. 26:00:00
Remove the medium from the well and wash the cells once with 100μl per well PBS.
Fix the cells in the well with 50μl solution of 4% formaldehyde in PBS for 5min at room temperature. 00:05:00
Add 50μl per well of substrate/stain solution and incubate the plate overnight at 37°C. 16:00:00
Observe the cells under microscope and evaluate the proportion of blue (β-gal-positive) cells.
creator: Misha Gurevich
